title: CreateVC
body:
# CreateVC Official ModPack
**The official modrinth pack for [CreateVC Server](https://www.createvc.org)**
![CreateVC Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/942efe51c4cdc4efec6531756e292fffddf88356_0.webp)
The goal for this project is to have a Minecraft server with compatability for every operating system, every (legal) preference, and a positive community for all ages.

## How to use?
- Install pack
- launch pack
- will download all mods needed from github and official mod pages during loading screen.
- will prompt you to restart your game.
- Relaunch instance and play CreateVC!

Version:
- NeoForge 1.21.1
- Build 21.1.228

### Curl

`CreateVC.mrpack`
```bash
curl -L -O "https://github.com/Jammersmurph/CreateVC/releases/latest/download/CreateVC.mrpack"
```
-----
## Thank You!
